short_summary: El Niño confirmed, wildfire risk sustained
rationale: El Niño confirmation is directly relevant to Portugal's elevated wildfire and drought risk this season, sustaining the existing baseline; no new qualitative escalation but the threat remains real for Iberian residents.

top_events.title: El Niño under way, threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: Scientists confirm El Niño is active; directly elevates wildfire, drought and extreme heat risk for Iberia this season.

top_events.title: Trump claims US-Iran deal, markets surge
top_events.summary: Potential easing of global energy prices offers modest relief for Portuguese cost of living if confirmed.

top_events.title: Powerful earthquake in southern Philippines, 37 dead
top_events.summary: Distant disaster; no direct relevance to Portugal beyond general awareness of seismic risk.
